name: Bevelle Cloister of Trials
steps: Place a Bevelle Sphere into the pedestal and push it onto the moving path. Ride the platform — press the button when the glyph arrow points right to steer correctly.
At the top of the maze, use the floor glyph to turn right. At the next glyph, turn right again.
Remove one Bevelle Sphere from the pedestal and place it in the slot to activate a portion of the lower path. Push the pedestal off the end to start at the lower path.
At the end of the top path, use the last glyph to turn 180 degrees and ride back.
Push the pedestal back onto the path and ride off the end to reach the beginning of the lower path.
Ride the lower path to the end and turn right. Cross to the purple glyph and insert the Glyph Sphere — the wall gives way, revealing a Destruction Sphere.
Take the Destruction Sphere and get back on the platform. Ride it off the end to start from the beginning.
Use the middle glyph to turn right. Remove the Bevelle Sphere from the slot and place it into the pedestal. Ride the path.
At the second-to-last glyph, turn right. At the next glyph, turn right again. Run the long stretch and insert the Destruction Sphere into the slot.
At the first glyph on the top path, turn right and ride down. Turn left at the intersection and go to the end.
Take the Glyph Sphere from the far end and place it into the pedestal. Ride back to the last lower-level glyph, turn right, and insert the Bevelle Sphere into the pedestal.
Move past the first two glyphs and turn right at the last glyph near the edge. Insert one Bevelle Sphere into the slot to open the path ahead.
Leave the pedestal at the bottom of the stairs. Ascend and open the chest on the right for an HP Sphere.
Insert one Bevelle Sphere into the slot to open a path on the left. Push the pedestal down the left path and ride to the end to receive the Knight Lance.
